name: part_004
file: tmp_【#冥ハロ2025】白上フブキ生誕３DLIVE「冥界Halloween Night!」【白上フブキ⧸ホロライブ】 [7Tm7dVsTPBk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_004.webm

scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki and Sakura Miko perform the final part of 'Happy End Princess'.
A short detective-themed story interlude featuring Fubuki and Miko.
Shirakami Fubuki and Amane Kanata perform 'Detective Continuous Murder Case' in a library setting.

subtitles.original: 王国で一躍有名になった小説の１つじゃないか
subtitles.english: Isn't that one of those novels that suddenly became famous in the kingdom?

subtitles.original: …ある女子学生探偵と推理作家の先生が織りなす楽しい…え？
subtitles.english: ...A fun story woven by a certain schoolgirl detective and a mystery writer... eh?

subtitles.original: いやいや、この事件が実際にあったのかまではわからないよ、
subtitles.english: No, no, we don't know if this case actually happened,

subtitles.original: でも、このシリーズは凄く人気なんですよね。
subtitles.english: but this series is incredibly popular, isn't it.

subtitles.original: わかりました！犯人はあなたですね！
subtitles.english: I've got it! The culprit is you!
